---
title: "get_events"
---

[< Back to Reference](../reference.qmd)

# `get_events()`

Get Events

## Usage

```r
get_events(
  status = NULL,
  series_ticker = NULL,
  with_nested_markets = FALSE,
  limit = 100,
  max_pages = NULL,
  kalshi_access_token = "KALSHI_API",
  demo = FALSE
)
```

## Arguments

| Argument | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `status` | Character. Filter by status: "open", "closed", "settled". |
| `series_ticker` | Character. Filter by series ticker. |
| `with_nested_markets` | Logical. Include nested market data. |
| `limit` | Integer. Results per page (1-200). Defaults to 100. |
| `max_pages` | Integer. Maximum pages to fetch. NULL for all. |
| `kalshi_access_token` | Character. Environment variable name for API key. |
| `demo` | Logical. Use demo environment if TRUE. |

## Value

A tibble with event information.

## Description

Retrieves a list of events with optional filtering. An event is a specific
occurrence within a series (e.g., "NYC High Temperature on Feb 8, 2025").

## Examples

```r
## Not run: 
# Get all open events
events <- get_events(status = "open")

# Get events for a specific series
events <- get_events(series_ticker = "KXHIGHNY")

## End(Not run)
```

## See also

Other events: 
`get_event()`,
`get_event_markets()`
